title: Support - Heidi Alexander — Heidi Alexander MP
headings: h3: It is an honour to represent the community that I was born and brought up in.
text_excerpt: Support - Heidi Alexander — Heidi Alexander MP 0 Skip to Content Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact It is an honour to represent the community that I was born and brought up in. I couldn’t sit on the sidelines and do nothing about the vacuum of honesty, integrity and decency at the heart of the previous Government. I’m proud to be part of the changed Labour Party. I’d love to hear from you, so please get in touch. Get in touch I am proud to be from Swindon South, I will always be on the side of Swindon South, and I will always work hard as your Labour MP. me@heidialexander.org.uk 07742 549 968 Heidi Alexander Labour MP for Swindon South Secretary of State for Transport Privacy Policy Promoted by Patrick Herring on behalf of Heidi Alexander, both at Suite 11, Marlborough House, 26 High Street, Old Town, Swindon, SN1 3EP Follow Twitter Facebook Instagram
